title: Lhyfe Supplies Renewable Hydrogen for First French Motorway Station Accessible to HGVs
content: Lhyfe (EURONEXT: LHYFE) has begun supplying renewable hydrogen to France's first motorway refuelling station accessible to heavy goods vehicles (HGVs). Operated by TEAL Mobility and located on the A4 motorway in the Grand Est region, the station opens strategic low-carbon corridors to Germany, Luxembourg, and Belgium. Since November 2025, Lhyfe has delivered hydrogen certified as Renewable Fuels of Non-Biological Origin (RFNBO)â€”the EU's strictest green standardâ€”under a multi-year contract. The station features a dispensing capacity of 1 tonne per day with 350 and 700 bar options for both trucks and light vehicles. Lhyfe, a European leader in green hydrogen, currently operates four production sites with 21 MW capacity and plans to increase its installed capacity by 70% in 2026. Its supply chain is supported by a modern fleet of 70 type-IV containers.
author: Analysts Account
